# Copilot Agent Instructions Alias

This file exists for tooling that looks for `.github/copilot-instruction.md`.

- Treat `.github/copilot-instructions.md` as the canonical instruction source.
- Apply all rules from `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.
- Apply repository rules from `.github/github-dev-rules.md`.
- If there is any discrepancy, `.github/copilot-instructions.md` takes precedence.
